name: BusX VR – City Bus Driving Simulator

reviews.review_description: BusX is a pretty relaxing driving game, controls are simple and smooth to use. I enjoyed just cruising and picking up passengers without any pressure. It’s good for chill gameplay when you just want to pass time. Would be better with more bus types to make it feel varied. Also adding more passengers and routes would make it more engaging.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5-star review! 😊 We’re happy you’re enjoying the smooth and relaxing gameplay. We’re working on adding more buses, routes, and passengers soon. Your feedback and support truly help us grow!
